---
title: &TITLE Name
last: 
first: 
people_group: "technician | postdoc | gradstudent | alumni"
email: 
education:
  - deg | inst  <br> 
subtitle: "Academic Technician | Postdoctoral Fellow | Graduate Student, dept "
description: ""
bio: ""
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:email@example.org
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## **Description**

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
